description: Create a schedule hierarchy in eQUEST to represent a cafeteria 'Lunch Rush' profile and assign it to the Ground Floor East zone (G.E02). The hierarchy must include a Day Schedule named 'Lunch-Rush-Day' (Type: FRACTION) with 1.0 occupancy from 11:00 AM to 2:00 PM and 0.0 at all other times; a Week Schedule named 'Lunch-Rush-Week' (Type: FRACTION) applying 'Lunch-Rush-Day' to Monday through Friday; and an Annual Schedule named 'Lunch-Rush-Annual' (Type: FRACTION) applying 'Lunch-Rush-Week' for the entire year. Assign 'Lunch-Rush-Annual' to the People (Occupancy) load of zone 'G.E02', run the annual simulation, and save the project.
